mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, B.HIT AS hit, B.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, B.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, M.NICKNAME AS writerNickname FROM BOARD B JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE B.BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType} ORDER BY B.BOARD_ID DESC

SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, B.HIT AS hit, B.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, B.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, M.NICKNAME AS writerNickname FROM BOARD B JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE B.BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
